scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w @portfolio/api" "npm run dev:worker -w @portfolio/api" "npm run dev -w @portfolio/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @portfolio/api && npm run build -w @portfolio/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @portfolio/api && npm run typecheck -w @portfolio/web
